rationale.P01: Primary replication lag 420s >> 30s threshold, never auto-resolved, connection-refused pattern surging 14x baseline. Root of the cascade. SEV1.
rationale.P02: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-db-conn-refused, onset 40s after the DB page). Collapse into the DB incident; do not page separately.
rationale.P03: Downstream symptom of P01 (DB-bound query latency, same root pattern). Duplicate of the DB cascade incident.
rationale.P04: Downstream symptom of P01, same root pattern. Part of the one DB incident.
rationale.P05: Chronic flapper: 15 fires in the last hour, oscillates around the 85% threshold and self-clears in ~22s on log rotation. Pure noise.
rationale.P06: Transient CPU blip, auto-resolved in 41s (GC pause). Below page-worthy duration.
rationale.P07: Transient CPU blip, auto-resolved in 28s. Self-healed, no customer impact.
rationale.P08: Duplicate of already-open incident INC-8800 (billing queue backlog) in incidents_open.json. A human is already engaged; do not re-page.
rationale.P09: Brief 5xx bump during fe-2026.03.12-a rollout, auto-resolved in 47s once pods finished rolling. Expected deploy transient.
rationale.P10: Marginally over threshold during scheduled batch drain, cleared in 19s. Routine.
rationale.P11: Cold-cache latency blip, self-resolved in 33s. Noise.
rationale.P12: Single marginal CPU blip, auto-resolved in 52s. Noise.
rationale.P13: Same disk flapper as P05, another oscillation. Noise.
rationale.P14: Memory ticked over during GC, recovered in 60s. Noise.
rationale.P15: Cold-cache latency blip, recovered in 24s. Noise.
rationale.P16: Post-deploy CPU settle, auto-resolved in 38s. Expected.
rationale.P17: Brief memory blip, recovered in 45s. Noise.
rationale.P19: Transient CPU blip, auto-resolved in 30s. Noise.

notes: Real DB cascade = one incident (P01 root; P02-P04 symptoms suppressed as duplicates). All other pages are flaps, transients, a known-open duplicate (P08/INC-8800), or a self-healed deploy blip.
